def classify_status(raw_status):
    if raw_status.lower() == "active":
        return "ACTIVE"
    elif raw_status.lower() == "pending":
        return "PENDING"
    elif raw_status.lower() == "suspended":
        return "SUSPENDED"
    elif raw_status.lower() == "archived":
        return "ARCHIVED"
    else:
        return "UNKNOWN"


def match_role(raw_role):
    if raw_role.lower() == "admin":
        return 3
    elif raw_role.lower() == "editor":
        return 2
    elif raw_role.lower() == "viewer":
        return 1
    return 0
